raw_consumer_statement: I filed the dispute back in XXXX about how a mechanic shop didnt do the work they said they work was faulty upon immediate inspection the truck blew up first drive I had dates receipts proving that the shop committed fraud including false dates that I proved with text communication through the shop and had other mechanic shops review the original mechanic work and provided details stating the work the mechanic didnt do and did improperly I provided text messages of the original mechanic stating he was going to refund bestbuy card then blocking me I had receipts of improper timelines unauthorized miles driven I gave them everything pictures copies and then then bestbuy citi visa states they never got the proof first I mailed it second I faxed it then I faxed it again each time I was never properly notified my dispute was denied each time I find out from my credit taking a drastic hit. I have called spoken with mangers this falls under their policy of coverage and I keep getting run around by different people with no solution. They tell me they will state on my profile to call me if they need more proof or something else yet I get no calls no emails the only emails I get is to spend more money on my credit card
